name: restaurant-management-system
description: Deployment entrypoint used by Railway: builds the frontend, copies it into the backend, and starts the API server on one origin. Not needed for local development - see backend/README.md and frontend/README.md for that.

scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build --prefix frontend && node scripts/copy-frontend-build.js && npx prisma generate --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.start: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma && node backend/src/server.js
